title: Resizable Adaptive Panel Proof v1
problem: ADR 0325 still called for a stronger fixed-window panel-resize/container-query teaching surface on first-party gallery/docs. The docking demo already proved the mechanism, but the default `Resizable` docs path did not promote that proof directly.

repro.summary: Reopen this closeout by showing that the `Resizable` gallery page now contains a fixed-window adaptive proof and that the promoted diag script flips the right pane from wide to compact without changing the viewport width.
commands: cargo run -p fretboard -- diag run tools/diag-scripts/ui-gallery/resizable/ui-gallery-resizable-adaptive-panel-proof.json --dir target/fret-diag/ui-gallery-resizable-adaptive-panel-proof --session-auto --pack --include-screenshots --launch target/release/fret-ui-gallery

gates.name: diag-proof
gates.command: cargo run -p fretboard -- diag run tools/diag-scripts/ui-gallery/resizable/ui-gallery-resizable-adaptive-panel-proof.json --dir target/fret-diag/ui-gallery-resizable-adaptive-panel-proof --session-auto --pack --include-screenshots --launch target/release/fret-ui-gallery

continue_policy.notes: This lane is closed. The first-party `Resizable` docs surface now teaches the fixed-window container-query proof directly. Reopen only if future evidence exceeds docs promotion and requires a broader adaptive authoring or runtime change.
